# Marcelo Vergara — the human in the circuit

> Engineering high-performance systems — from bare-metal infrastructure to real-time data visualization and AI integration.

## Projects

- [ENP Secure Chat](https://enpsecurechat.com): Enterprise RAG assistant for O&G — FGA enforced inside Qdrant before any chunk is ranked, so restricted documents are mathematically invisible to the LLM.
- [Fábula Infantil](https://fabulainfantil.com): Stateless multi-turn narrative control via GPT-4o mini — full choice history forwarded each request maintains continuity across three branching acts, with gpt-image-1 illustrations assembled into an animated 3D book.
- [Monitoring Links](https://www.monitoringlinks.com): URL uptime monitoring — GCP Pub/Sub fans out one check per URL so the 5-minute cron returns in milliseconds regardless of fleet size, with OIDC-authenticated push delivery and a dead-letter topic ensuring no threshold alert is ever silently dropped.
- [VergaraVerse](https://vergaraverse.com): GoPro GPMF binary telemetry — parsed entirely in-browser via TinyGo WebAssembly, zero server compute — drives a 60 Hz Canvas HUD with frame-accurate WebM export, Strava GPX sync, live street-name geocoding, and a hand-rolled vector map with zero DOM dependencies.
